title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 1 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 1 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 1 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/07/2025
Today, DCE Iron Ore futures market was in the doldrums, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 708.5, down 1.32% for the day. Traders' willingness to sell was moderate.Steel mills mainly purchased as needed, with inquiries being average. The market transaction atmosphere was also average.
